name: clause-lookup
description: Tests whether the system can find a specific clause in a contract
query: What is the termination clause in the Acme Corp service agreement?
expected_answer: The termination clause (Section 8.2) allows either party to terminate with 30 days written notice.

seed_documents.title: Acme Corp Service Agreement
seed_documents.content: Section 8.2 Termination: Either party may terminate this agreement with 30 days written notice.
